source_files.main.spy:
# Main entry point - imports and uses shape classes

from shapes import Circle, Rectangle
from utils import PI

def main():
    c: Circle = Circle(5.0)
    r: Rectangle = Rectangle(4.0, 6.0)
    
    print(c.name)
    print(r.describe())
    print(c.draw())
    print(c.area())
    print(r.area())
